caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK" partially visible on the front, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone. He is adorned with gold chains and a watch on his left wrist. He is positioned in a studio setting with a light-colored wall behind him featuring several gold stars and the words "EMPIRE HUSTLE" repeated. A screen in the background displays "BOSS" and "KOL." On-screen graphics include a circular logo that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and a banner that reads "BOSS TALK 101." As the sequence progresses, the man maintains his position, shifting his gaze and slightly adjusting his facial expression while continuing to speak into the microphone. The camera remains static, capturing him from the waist up as he engages in a conversation.
